dict.string: Pocket Agent 使用相机拍照、扫码，并在发送前让你确认内容。
Pocket Agent connects to your local agent runtime on your local network.

Pocket Agent may use your approximate location only when you include a task-scoped Context Snapshot, so your local runtime can understand the current situation without storing precise coordinates by default.
Pocket Agent records audio only when you press the voice button so it can turn your request into an editable transcript before sending text to your local agent runtime.
Pocket Agent may read motion state only when you include a task-scoped Context Snapshot, so your local runtime can adapt the response without background tracking.
Pocket Agent saves edited photos only when you tap Save.
Pocket Agent lets you choose photos to edit through your local agent runtime.
Pocket Agent may check calendar availability only when you include a task-scoped Context Snapshot; event titles, attendees, notes, and event bodies are not sent by default.
Pocket Agent uses speech recognition only after you press the voice button to turn that recording into an editable transcript.
